name: Crusoe
description: Crusoe — GPU cloud compute powered by stranded natural gas, targeting AI/ML training workloads with low carbon footprint.

seo.title: Crusoe — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Crusoe: Crusoe — GPU cloud compute powered by stranded natural gas, targeting AI/ML training workloads with low carbon footprint.

when_to_use: AI model training on low-carbon GPU cloud from stranded gas
Cost-efficient H100 GPU clusters for ML research teams
Sustainable compute for organizations with carbon commitments
LLM fine-tuning on energy-efficient GPU infrastructure
Replacing hyperscaler GPU costs with Crusoe's green cloud

cons: Ecosystem thinner than AWS or GCP
Contracts often required for best rates
review.verdict: A credible specialist GPU cloud with a genuine sustainability angle, narrower in services than hyperscalers.
review.best_for: AI teams training large models who want cheap, lower-carbon GPUs
review.not_for: Teams needing a full managed cloud beyond raw GPU compute
